description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE). The 'Payment Gateway' service at ~/projects/payment-gateway/ has a critical deadlock bug where the process remains running but becomes unresponsive, bypassing standard Docker restart policies. Implement a self-healing watchdog pattern in the docker-compose.yml stack that monitors the gateway's health endpoint (http://localhost:8000/health) and automatically restarts the service if it becomes unhealthy. Verify the implementation by triggering a deadlock via 'curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/sabotage' and ensuring the service automatically recovers.
